hero.title: TaiwanHolidays
hero.subtitle: Taiwan national holiday / make-up workday queries — official calendar 2017-2027 embedded, make-up Saturdays handled correctly, scheduling helpers included. Offline, zero dependencies.

official.title: Official Data Embedded
official.desc: DGPA government calendar 2017-2027 embedded, incl. the 2025 statutory holiday reform; works offline, yearly minor updates.

makeup.title: Make-up Workdays Done Right
makeup.desc: Six-way day classification; make-up Saturdays correctly count as workdays — the key difference from weekend-only checks.

scheduling.title: Scheduling Helpers
scheduling.desc: Next/previous workday and inclusive workday counting — ready for scheduling and attendance systems.

periods.title: Holiday Periods
periods.desc: Finds 3+ day consecutive breaks (e.g. the 9-day Lunar New Year), cross-year periods untruncated.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.intro: Pick a topic below to get started with TaiwanHolidays.
docs.wip: Page content coming soon — see README.md in the GitHub repo.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.intro: See docs/en/changelog.md in the GitHub repo for the full history.

sponsor.title: Sponsor
sponsor.intro: If TaiwanHolidays helps you, consider sponsoring the developer via cryptocurrency or Binance Pay.

usdt.title: USDT (BEP20)
usdt.warningTitle: BSC (Binance Smart Chain / BEP20) network only
usdt.warningBody: Sending to other networks (ERC20 / TRC20 / Solana, etc.) will result in permanent loss of funds.

binancePay.title: Binance Pay
binancePay.desc: Scan to sponsor via Binance Pay
